scripts.main: npm run typical && rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.json && vite build
scripts.lint: npm run typical && eslint --config eslint.config.mjs --max-warnings 0 'src/**/*.ts' && prettier --config .prettierrc.js --ignore-path .ignore --check .
scripts.serve: npm run typical && rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.json && vite
